name: Nuoc Leo#3
recipeIngredient: 1 small Piece of pork liver (see note below), minced
10 Roasted Peanuts, coarsely chopped [See note above. Thin strips of hot pepper for garnish]
recipeInstructions:
1. Using medium heat, fry the garlic in the oil until fragrant.
2. Add the liver and pork to the pan. Lower the heat.
3. Stir in the tomato paste; mix well.
4. Add the Tuong. Mix again.
5. Stir in the water and peanut butter.
6. Raise the heat back to medium. Add the sugar.
7. Boil for 1 minute, then transfer the mixture to a bowl.
8. In a separate frying pan over medium heat, stir-fry sesame seeds until golden brown (2-3 minutes).
9. Combine the sesame seeds with the nuoc leo sauce.
10. Finish by adding chopped peanuts and garnishing with thin strips of hot pepper.
Note: Beef or chicken liver can be substituted for pork liver, but pork liver is preferred. The piece should be about the size of a large chicken liver. (From "The Classic Cuisine of Vietnam", Bach Ngo and Gloria)
